entry.title: Re: Reduce time to market with Hosted Pages in Customer Data Cloud (CDC)
entry.content:
Great blog

In the CLP option would the DY need to implement session checking like accounts.session.verify JS and some webSDK confin in CDC login page to recirect back to DY site?

entry.title: BAPI_DISPUTE_CREATE not linking the dispute case with the open item
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are using BAPI_DISPUTE_CREATE to create dispute cases via interface. Our dispute case is getting created with all the parameters we have passed and the linked objects are also getting updated but when we go to the FBL5N report we are not able to see the dispute case linked to the open item. 

Is there any additional BAPI we need to run or any parameter we need to pass to link the dispute case with the customer invoice?

Parameters we are passing in the BAPI - 

CASE_GUID_CREATE

CASE_TYPE

UPDATE_TASK = X

AMOUNTS_DELTA - DELTA_ORIGINAL, DELTA_DISPUTED and DISPUTE_CURR

ATTRIBUTES - PROCESSOR, FIN_BUKRS, CASE_TITLE, FIN_KUNNR and DISPUTE_CURR

OBJECTS - VBRK, BSEG (BUKRS+BELNR+GJAHR) and KNA1

entry.title: Re: Upload General Journal Entries - incomplete header entry
entry.content: It is an informational message and should not prevent the journal entry postings. However, you can review your template in the header section to ensure dates, references, and company codes are populated. You can also try posting a manual journal entry using the same data to check if everything is ok.

entry.title: Re: How to do data modelling of 200+ plus tables in IDT i...
entry.content:
this cannot be a reasonable business-request with 200 tables in IDT !!!
do the raw-data-connection/processing in the source-system/DB e.g. with SQL and finally use these result(s) to build a clean semantic-model in IDT.

entry.title: Re: Data Federation in Datasphere
entry.content: I just learned that Data Federation in SAP Datasphere is a game-changer! It uses virtualization to unify data sources in real time without consolidating them, enhancing agility and preserving data integrity. It is a powerful tool for modern data management.

entry.title: Install/configure Configuration Validation and SOS in Solman
entry.content:
Hello SAP Support, 

I've reported this case, as I cannot find the links/documentation in order to advance with the following:

In order to manage/monitor the security in our managed S/4HANA systems, we want to install and configure the following scenarios in our SAP Solution Manager system "DSM":

1) Configuration Validation
2) Security Optimization Services (SOS)

Our Solution Manager system is installed with release 7.20 Support Package Stack 17:

ST    720    DIGITS    SAPK-72017INSTMAIN    SAP Solution Manager Tool




------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Install/configure Configuration Validation and SOS in...
entry.content:
Hi customer,

 

Regarding your query, please find details with below link/note:

1) Configuration Validation

=>https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/techops/3806950748.html#ConfigurationValidationHome-ConfigurationValidationinSAPSolutionManager7.2

2) Security Optimization Services (SOS)

=>

Note :

696478 - SAP Security Optimization: Preparation, additions.

Wiki：

Security Optimization Service - Solution Manager - Support Wiki (sap.com)

Help portal :

SAP Security Optimization Services Portfolio

Sincerely,

SAP Support

Hi, @Dan_Wroblewski 

I couldn't have seen this feature for a while, Is this no longer available?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Signavio methodologies - KPIs mapping to Business Pro...
entry.content:
Hey @Gilou ,

I saw the link that was shared by the SAP Team which is connected to Cost and Resouce Analysis from an Execution poin of view, which comes really much more from "Shop Floor Operations" pov.

Although indeed that is also important, what SAP Signavio Process Manager # is not delvering Out-of-the-Box, is attributes for KPIs and PPIs that can be filled in per Process Level, to create a matrix or report and understand what Process Levels are supported by which KPIs. Nor is there a simple way to get a list of best practice KPIs from SAP Best Practices and Import them into SAP Signavio since those attributes are not standard.

So all of this needs to be defined by the organisation with Collaboration of Business Architecture and Process Owners,  and then KPI and PPI attributes need to be created by your admin, and then filled in by your Process owners and Process SMEs for all processes,  in SAP Signavio Process Manager 

Here comes a simple example, creating "Text" fields for KPI and PPI in Custom Attributes (Note: there are other ways that KPIs and PPIs are created as Directory entries and then selected from drop downs, for example)

OK, Lets say you are focusing on the Process E2E (L1): Order to Cash for Automotive.

This E2E L1 has 2 Modular Processes (L2):  1) Order-to-Fulfill   and  2) Invoice to Cash,  each of them decomposes on also on more Process Segments (L3), but lets decompose in L3 for Invoice-to-Cash and then that one into L4s. 

See screen shot 1

In the above example, the organisation has a pretty good understanding of what PPIs and KPIs contribute (bottom-up) to the success of the L2 Invoice to Cash, and thus the related processes need to monitored accoridngly if any of thise PPIs or KPIs are falling below targets.

And they want to ensure that this is also traceble in Signavio, thus all the KPIs need to be associated to the relevant processes. 

First, then new attributes need to be created and assigned to the relevant elements 

See screen shot 2 and 3

Then, when the Signavio admin has assigned the new custom attributes to the relevant elements ( which I recommend should be: BPMN2.0 Diagrams and collapsed processes, as well as Value Chain Diagrams, Processes, Collapsed processes and Groups ), they can be filled in according to all the PPI and KPI work done by the Business Architect and Process Owners. 

See screen shots 4 and 5

 

Then when it is time to design a KPI Dashboard for Order to Cash, all the PPIs and KPIs for all their processes at L4, L3 and L2 need to be included, that way you know how the bottom up metrics are supporting the End to End, and you can trace what PPIs are performing poorly at L4 and identify what is needed to improve processes, people, data or system performance

Not entirely sure if this is what you were looking for, my gut feel told me perhaps, so I hope it inspires or helps a bit.

best!

J.D. Wong-Loera (Business Architect)

What should I do to make MS04 the same as CS11?

entry.title: Re: its possible create SAP notes?
entry.content: Creating SAP notes is doable! SAP notes are like messages or reminders you can write within SAP systems to share info or address issues.

entry.title: Using Migration Cockpit for SAP S/4HANA on add module situation
entry.content:
Hello, 
I'd like to confirm about Migration Cockpit.
I've been joining a project about adding TRM module for the Customer who is already using S/4HANA FI module.
And I want to use the Migration Cockpit to add and to update BP roles in the BP master that is aliready set.
In this case, can I set BP roles, for example "issuer" and so on, for existing BP items?
If its avalable, would you tell me how to use the Migration cockpit?
Best regards.

entry.title: Re: Story Report Calculated Column finding the MAX
entry.content: Hi Jeroen, Thanks for taking time to reply me. Appreciate it very much. This is exactly what I am doing. I am just showing the MAX of number of days as a work around. Another followup question, is there a way to create a calculated dimension date field by adding the number of days to a date? I only see the option of calculated measures in the story report but I don 't find the option of calculated dimension. Any ideas or recommendations to arrive at the MAX date and show in the story? Thanks - Vicky

entry.title: How to recover particular schema from a system backup into another tenant
entry.content:
Hi

We have SAP Business One HANA on a production server and there is a development server (Both are different Physical Servers), we need to restore a particular schema from the system backup of production server to a the Development server with out impacting the existing development server environment.

Kindly help with any notes

entry.title: Re: No entry in ODQMON and DHCDCMON after doing the Initi...
entry.content:
Hi Vinay,

No all scenario will use ODQ interface. Only when DPA (DP agent) is defined in DataSphere, ODP will be used, there'll be entry in ODQMON.

Next question: is DPA used between cloud and Azure? You may check the online help: Preparing Connectivity for Connections | SAP Help Portal

In 1st column 'Connect Type', you can filter using Keywords 'Azure' and choose your scenario. Then check 2nd column, you'll see if DPA is used ('no' or 'yes'). When it's Yes, ODQMON will have entry.  You may also see the attached screen here.

Regarding the entries in DHCDCMON, it's a totally different topic with ODQMON... You would need check from several perspective:

  • DHCDCMON -> Application log -> Is there any error?
  • After CDC init, is there any data change in the source view?
  • Is there any code correction about CDC based on your SAP_BW version?
  • ....

Regards,
Maggie

entry.title: AGING REPORT FOR ACCOUNTS PAYABLE IS NOT WORKING IN SAP S4HANA PUBLIC CLOUD TDD.

Business Group  SAP_FIN_BCG_AP_ANALYTICS_PC and Business Role SAP_BR_AP_MANAGER  is already assigned but still said app is not working.

 

Thanks in Advance!

Anj

entry.title: Re: C4C: Contact person set to obsolete when deleted in ERP

entry.title: Re: what are the difference between resource from APQC, v...
entry.content:
Hi @ghemraj 

Here comes some insght that might be useful.

APQC, has one generic PCF (Process Classification Framework) which is the cross-industry. 

But they have different categories change for the different PCFs: Retail, Consumer Packaged Goods, Utilites, etc, and thus all the different levels from 2 to 5 also change, for each one.

So you have to analyse which PCF is going to serve you best at your organization, sometimes, I have had to take inspiration from 2 different PCFs to create the final Process Hierarchy. Below is a visual explanation from APQC that might be complimentary to the information that is in the Signavio APQC page:

Shared with permission of APQC

My opinion in relation to Greenfield implementations, is that following the SAP Activate methodolgy and trying to focus to Fit to Standard might be the best way to tackle the process management for SAP Signavio Process Navigator  and SAP Signavio Process Manager  in Explore phase, and then APQC frameworks can indeed help as inspiration to define processes that are gaps resulting from the Fit-to-Standard Analysis workshops, so there process decomposition can serve as guide for to-be process design. 

APQC is an Application Agnostic Framework, since it is created from interviewing hundreds of companies per Industry independent of the applicaiton they run. I believe that APQC is good to ensure that one gets a good inspiration for handovers and level 5 and level 4, but one generally still needs to re design many tasks and some level 4s to suit the companies lingo, organization structure and systems.


Here is a screen shot of the APQC PCF Cross Industry v7.3.1, note that there are Operational Processes and Management and Support Processes.

Best!

JD

entry.title: How to create qr code in smartform
Re: 0FI_ACDOCA_10: Carryforward figures have RCLNT(client...

entry.title: How to check who deleted an inspection plan?
entry.content:
Hi SAP expert,

When we try to open an inspection lot, we have error "Inspection plan DIGITS has been deleted". Nobody know how it is possible. We didn't delete Inspection Plan. And we have feeling, that more Inspection Plan were deleted. Is possibility to find deleted Inspection Plans? And who deleted it and how ? We would like to train users, how to/why NO delete using Inspection Plan. 

Thanks for explanation.

BR and have a nice day


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to check who deleted an inspection plan?
entry.content:
Hi,

The CDS view I_InspectionPlanVersion provides access to the header data of inspection plan versions (task list type Q). In this CDS view, you can check whether an inspection plan is deleted by the "Deletion Indicator" field and who did this by "Changed By" field.
You can check the CDS view data in Customer Data Browser app.

BR
SAP Support

entry.title: MRP run on materials shared between plant and MRP area
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have materials (say material A) produced both at the plant (say 0001 Sloc) and the MRP Area (say 0002 Sloc). After the MRP run on requirements for A at both 0001 and 0002, the planned orders on A at both 0001 and 0002 are cascading the dependent requirements on the BOM components (say B and C) only on 0001 Sloc. I can't update the Sloc in BOM as the material header is same (which is A).  We need to have the clear segregation of the requirements of B and C between 0001 and 0002 based on where the planned orders are created for A. Can someone please help on how to achieve this?

Thanks,

Regards, Guru

When I remove the update capability from the behavior definition, the fields become non-editable even during the creation phase. What is the best approach to achieve this effectively? I also tried field (readonly : update) but it does not work.

Kantrice D

entry.title: A Closer Look at the New Metering Metrics added to Metrics Service from SAP HANA Cloud 2024 QRC2
entry.content:
In the relentless quest to boost transparency and allow our users to have a better understanding of their SAP HANA Cloud charges, we are delighted to introduce the new metering metrics to our Metrics Service as part of 2024 QRC2. The primary aim of this update is to give a clear and exact account of the usage of resources.

The addition of metering metrics gives you the ability to pinpoint the charges presently being applied to your system. The metering metrics provides a comprehensive insight into resource usage, which is measured in Capacity Units (CU) for various facets such as memory, storage, compute power, backup and network operations.

An array of system components is under the purview of these metrics, which include default nodes, replica nodes, snapshot nodes, and individual features like Cloud Connector. An exclusive feature of these metrics is that they all return 'delta' type measurements. This implies that the values, which are captured at hourly intervals, measure the changes since the metric value was last taped, giving you an up-to-date report about your consumption.

Metering metrics list

Furthermore, we've ensured the extension of these metrics to both SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database and SAP HANA Cloud, data lake. You can find all the information and details in the official help document here.

How to use metrics service tutorial

To make it convenient for you to consume these metrics via the REST API, we recommend the SAP tutorial "Explore SAP HANA Cloud Alerts and Metrics". You would specifically want to look at the section "Access database metering metrics". Find it here.

Consumption monitor in HANA Cloud Central

Alongside metering metrics availability, we are also thrilled to release the consumption monitor application in HANA Cloud Central. This application lets you monitor consumption in a user-friendly interface, offering you a clear view of your system's consumption. Learn more about using the HANA Cloud Central here.

Conclusion

Armed with these new functionalities, we hope that you'll have a better understanding and grip over your system consumption. We genuinely believe that our constant enhancement will not only lead to more transparency but also help you in making informed strategic decisions. Stay tuned for more updates as we continue to evolve for your needs.

entry.title: Re: Info type pop ups interrupting back ground jobs
entry.content: Oops!! i think i clearly mentioned that my prog calls other Z*FM which pops-up an information msg (type i) and i have to hit enter to continue.

entry.title: AIIP rules for Canada Depreciation Method
entry.content:
Currently, an enhanced first-year CCA is available under the AIIP rules. The AIIP was introduced in 2018 and is expected to be available for the assets acquired and became avaiable for use (AFU) by the end of 2028. The AIIP rule applies only to the assets acquired in the year. The half-year-rule does not apply for the assets that qualify as AIIP. Instead, for most of the assets, the first year CCA is increased as follows:

For example,Straight-line Class13,14
if a patent has an acquisition value of $100k and has a useful life of 5 years, then the depreciation expense for the year will be $100k/5 years = $20,000

AIIP rules:
Assets became AFU by 2023,The first year CCA equal to 3 times the normal first-year CCA (the normal first-year CCA means the CCA with the half-year rule)
the depreciation expense will be $30,000 $20,000 $20,000 $20,000 $10,000

Assets became AFU between 2024 and 2027,The first year CCA equal to 2 times the normal first-year CCA (the normal first-year CCA means the CCA with the half-year rule)
the depreciation expense will be $20,000 $20,000 $20,000 $20,000 $20,000

Assets became AFU after 2027,The first year CCA equal to the normal first-year CCA (the normal first-year CCA means the CCA with the half-year rule)

the depreciation expense will be $10,000 $20,000 $20,000 $20,000 $20,000

However useful year is inputted by user.
How can I set Depreciation Method for Class13,14 with AIIP rules if I don't know the useful year.

Hi @Vitaliy-R , I am in week2, while running the below query-

 

(hdbcli.dbapi.ProgrammingError) (259, 'invalid table name: Could not find table/view GOOGLE_NEWS in schema DEVCHALLENGER: line 15 col 21 (at pos 352)') [SQL: SELECT RN, WORD, RELATED_WORD, SIMILARITY_SCORE, L2DISTANCE

entry.title: Smart chart facet is not working in Object page using ABAP CDS
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am using CDS Annotations to create a Fiori Elements List Object app and have used a CDS view with Ui.Chart annotation to be called as Chart reference association from Object Page. But I am getting error as ‘Assertion failed: ManagedObject.apply: encountered unknown setting 'timeAxis' for class 'sap.chart.Chart' (value:'[object Object]')’ when loading the application.

Following is sample code: 

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZTEMPCHARTVW'
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Temperature Line Chart Data'

define view Z_TemperatureChartView
as select from ZTemperatureTable
{
key timestamp,
temperature
}
where timestamp >= $session.system_date - 3 and timestamp < $session.system_date

@ui.chart: [
{
chartType: #LINE,
dimensions: ['timestamp'],
measures: ['temperature'],
dimensionAttributes: [
{
dimension: 'timestamp',
role: #CATEGORY
}
],
measureAttributes: [
{
measure: 'temperature',
role: #AXIS_1
}
]
}
]
@ui.presentationVariant: [
{
sortOrder: [
{
by: 'timestamp',
direction: #ASC
}
]
}
]

can anybody suggest why the error is coming. I am using S4 on prem 2022 system.

 

regards,

Dev

entry.title: Re: ABAP Solution instance and xsuaa creation failed - AB...
entry.content:
Hello Vishnu,

it looks like you are trying to deploy multitenant application MTA with service plan "application" for abap-solution service. But abap-solution service only has service plan "standard".

I would recommend checking the reference solution here: abap-saas-reference-solution

Best regards,
Peter

entry.title: Re: Child Entity Creation without update in RAP
entry.content:
Hello,

The answer should be with Behavior Definition only as you tried before.

Try with below Field Characteristics available in Behavior Definition of RAP:

field(readonly:update) Field1

Go through the below documentation:

https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_cp_index_htm/CLOUD/en-US/abenbdl_field_char.htm#!ABAP_VARIANT_6@6@

This should help!

Thanks,

Sijin

entry.title: Re: RRI Transfer multiple Values as selection criteria
entry.content: Prerequisite for this trick - RRI target query should have input ready selection variable with multiple single value/ selection option setting

entry.title: Re: No entry in ODQMON and DHCDCMON after doing the Initi...
entry.content:
Hello Maggie, Thanks for your reply.

So , we will only have entry in ODQMON if we are using DP agent (DPA) for connection.

We are using Cloud Connector to connect S4/HANA and DataSphere. Replication flow is used to load data from S4/HANA to Azure. The standard ABAP CDS views are used for doing the loads. The INIT and delta loads are running fine and data is loaded to Azure. We are not seeing entries in DHCDCMON for these extractors. The delta loads are getting data , but no values in Master log or subscriber log table.

Thanks,

Vinay

entry.title: Re: S4H aATP - Is "check level" capability available for...
entry.content:
SAP support was so kind to answer my question (7963439/2024) - this is (unfortunately) still missing functionality in S4H-aATP as of current release (July 2024). They have it on the roadmap but no planned implementation date or committment yet if and when it will be made available in S4H.

Regards

Thomas

entry.title: Re: Statement assignment groups
entry.content:
Hi @Rajani ,

It is possible to lock the group membership of the statement assignment groups.  When editing the group, scroll to the very bottom and you will see a lock icon.  Once you enable this, the group membership will not update dynamically.

Hope that helps.

Christian

entry.title: 2024-07 Developer Challenge - Task 1 - Your first service and first endpoint
entry.content:
This is a task in the 2024-07 "Reverse APIs" SAP Developer Challenge.

So, you've completed the warm-up task 0 and have managed to get a simple CAP server up, running and accessible from the cloud, and therefore (critically for this month's challenge) accessible by the TESTER component. Great! Now it's time to create your first API endpoint. What does that mean, and what do you have to do?

As this is your first task where you have to create both a service and an endpoint, some help and hints are given. So it's a little more reading for you, but don't worry, the subsequent task descriptions won't be as verbose.

API endpoints and services

An API endpoint very often exists in the wider context of a service, which you can think of as being a "container" for one or more endpoints. An OData service will typically offer multiple entity set resources, plus perhaps some action and function imports.

For example, the classic Northwind service offers various "collections" which normally translate into "entity sets", such as Customers, Products and Categories. And as for function and action imports, the TripPin service, for example, sports a function import called GetNearestAirport*.

*I was surprised to see that my nearest airport is apparently in Rome, but then remembered that there are only 15 airports in the dataset.

Not every service is OData, of course. But in the context of enterprise computing, it's an extremely well respected, understood and used open standard. And CAP makes it child's play to create an OData service and fill it with API endpoints.

Creating your first service

And as the idea of this challenge is to use CAP, then the first thing you'll need to do is create a simple service. You can modify the existing CatalogService that you got for free when you initialised the CAP project in Task 0. You know, the one that exposes a Books entity set, and is defined declaratively, with CDL, in srv/cat-service.cds:

using my.bookshop as my from '../db/data-model';

service CatalogService {
    @readonly entity Books as projection on my.Books;
}
 

But what we recommend is that you leave that CatalogService as it is, and create your own new service. And while you could define it in the same srv/cat-service.cds file, instead, we recommend you take advantage of the wonderfully flexible nature of the CDS compiler ... and create a (pair of) new file(s), in the srv/ directory, in which you will define your service.

Hint: As you'll see, the name of the service you'll be required to create here is basic, so, within the srv/ directory, why not use the filename basic.cds. Furthermore, the API endpoint you'll be required to create in this task is an unbound function within that service, so (as with all actions and functions) you'll need to provide an implementation, so why not use the filename basic.js for that and place that file next to (in the same directory as) basic.cds.

The requirements

Here are the specific requirements for this task.

Define a new service.

Make sure the service name is basic.

Have it be served via the OData V4 protocol (this is what all services are served via by default with CAP). But don't have it served at the standard path for an OData V4 protocol based service (which would be /odata/v4/basic), instead, have it served at the simpler path /basic.

The service, at least at this point in the challenge, needs to have a single API endpoint, specifically one that is called ping, that can be called with the HTTP GET method, takes no parameters, and returns a JSON payload that looks like this:

{
  "@odata.context": "$metadata#Edm.String",
  "value": "pong"
}
 

It is critical (to test success) that what's returned in the value property here is the JSON string "pong".

In other words, this API endpoint should be defined as an unbound function.

When the service, containing this API endpoint, is fully defined, and served via the OData V4 protocol, the metadata document should look like this:

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<edmx:Edmx Version="4.0" xmlns:edmx="http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/ns/edmx">
  <edmx:Reference Uri="https://sap.github.io/odata-vocabularies/vocabularies/Common.xml">
    <edmx:Include Alias="Common" Namespace="com.sap.vocabularies.Common.v1"/>
  </edmx:Reference>
  <edmx:Reference Uri="https://oasis-tcs.github.io/odata-vocabularies/vocabularies/Org.OData.Core.V1.xml">
    <edmx:Include Alias="Core" Namespace="Org.OData.Core.V1"/>
  </edmx:Reference>
  <edmx:DataServices>
    <Schema Namespace="basic" xmlns="http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/ns/edm">
      <EntityContainer Name="EntityContainer">
        <FunctionImport Name="ping" Function="basic.ping"/>
      </EntityContainer>
      <Function Name="ping" IsBound="false" IsComposable="false">
        <ReturnType Type="Edm.String"/>
      </Function>
    </Schema>
  </edmx:DataServices>
</edmx:Edmx>
 

If you've not defined (here: in srv/basic.cds) and written an implementation (here: in srv/basic.js) for a function or action before, then you need to know a couple of things.

First, know that you need to implement such functions or actions via the on event. Also, know that there are two implementation styles in CAP Node.js*, described in the Capire section How to provide custom service implementations?:

  • the ES6 class based style, extending the cds.ApplicationService class
  • the older and simpler cds.service.impl style

Note that the older style is translated automatically, behind the scenes, to the ES6 class based style anyway.

* As mentioned in the Introduction to this challenge, hints are for the Node.js flavour of CAP, but of course you're welcome to use the Java flavour if you prefer.

Once you've got your service defined, and a simple implementation ready, with an on handler for the ping event, you're ready.

It is definitely worth testing it yourself first, e.g. with curl, or Postman, or whatever tool you prefer for making HTTP calls. With your server running (on, let's say, the default local CAP server port of 4004), make a request like this:

curl -s --url 'localhost:4004/basic/ping()'
 

and the reponse should look like this:

{"@odata.context":"$metadata#Edm.String","value":"pong"}
 

Submitting your API endpoint to the TESTER

Now you're ready to submit your CANDIDATE service, with the specific API endpoint, to the TESTER!

The payload

The task identifier you need to supply in the payload of your submission is: basic-ping.

While some of you lovely folks with a more rebellious and hacker nature (I'm looking at you @ajmaradiaga and @gphadnis2000 :-)) have already kicked the tyres of the TESTER service, this should be the first time you'll be using the TESTER service.

Most of what you need to know is described in the the section titled "The Tester service, and making a test request" in the main challenge blog post, so head over to that section for a quick refresher first, then come back here.

Now, to have your freshly minted API endpoint in this task tested, you'll need to submit a JSON payload like this:

{
  "communityid": "<your-community-id>",
  "serviceurl": "<the-URL-of-your-service>",
  "task": "basic-ping"
}
 

Here's an example (don't use these values for communityid and serviceurl, they're specific to me and provided here just for illustration):

{
  "communityid": "qmacro",
  "serviceurl": "https://c0df-85-255-235-188.ngrok-free.app/basic",
  "task": "basic-ping"
}
 

Note that the value for the communityid property should be your ID on this SAP Community platform (e.g. mine is "qmacro").

Note also the value for the serviceurl property should be the absolute URL (i.e. including the scheme), of your CANDIDATE service (see ℹ️ A note on URLs and services), not the specific API endpoint.

The service URL

Of course, you need to make sure your new service and API endpoint are available to the TESTER, so supplying http://localhost:4004/basic as the value for the serviceurl property is not going to work. Make sure you either redeploy your CAP project (if you're pushing to Cloud Foundry) or still have your ngrok tunnel up and running (if you're using the ngrok tunnel approach).

Submitting the test request

You'll need to submit that JSON payload in a POST request to this endpoint:

https://developer-challenge-2024-07.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/tester/testServer

and you'll need to supply a Content-Type header stating that the representation of the payload resource has a media type of application/json.

Here's a curl invocation doing exactly that, by way of example (and using my specific values shown in the illustration above):

curl \
  --data '{"communityid":"qmacro","serviceurl":"https://c0df-85-255-235-188.ngrok-free.app/basic","task":"basic-ping"}' \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --url 'https://developer-challenge-2024-07.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/tester/testServer'
 

Types of responses

You'll see one of two types of responses- an error response, or a test result response.

Error response

If there's something wrong with your call then you'll get an error response. For example, if you haven't supplied a value for the communityid property, you'll get an HTTP 400 error response with a payload like this:

{
  "error": {
    "code": "400",
    "message": "Missing Community ID value",
    "@Common.numericSeverity": 4
  }
}
 

Similarly, if the TESTER cannot reach your endpoint, you'll get HTTP 500 error response with a payload like this:

{
  "error": {
    "code": "500",
    "message": "Error calling service endpoint",
    "@Common.numericSeverity": 4
  }
}
 

Other similar errors may occur, for example if you supply a missing or invalid task identifier or service URL.

Test result response

If the TESTER manages to reach your API endpoint successfully, it will then check that the response returned is what is required and expected. In the case of this task, the response required and expected is the static value "pong". If that is what is received, a positive test result response will be returned, and will look like this:

{"@odata.context":"$metadata#Edm.String","value":"PASS"}
 

If a different value is received, then a negative test response will be returned, and will look like this:

{"@odata.context":"$metadata#Edm.String","value":"FAIL"}
 

That's it!

Logging of test results

Each time there's a call to the TESTER by any participant, and a test result response can be issued, that test request is logged. So you can check on your progress, and the progress of your fellow participants.

The logged requests are available in an entity set served by the TESTER service. The entity set URL is https://developer-challenge-2024-07.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/tester/Testlog and being an OData V4 entity set, all the normal OData system query options are available to you for digging into that information.

But that's all for now on that.

Until the next task, have fun, and if you have any questions or comments, leave them below!

entry.title: Re: How to Import Financial Plan Data
entry.content:
Dear @Cirlei_Guedes ,

Thank you for the blog.

we have the requirement to migrate Actual values into the WBS on S/4HANA on-prem. Do you know any app that can support this?
Load method (BAPI/ FM/ IDOC) to migrate WBS elemen... - SAP Community

Thanks and regards,
Het Patel

entry.title: Re: BADI SD_SLS_CHECK_ITEM was not triggering.
entry.content: Hi SivaSidda, You can try to use APP Custom Logic Tracing and do the business process again, then you can see if the BAdI is triggered in system. Best Regards, Zhehui

entry.title: Re: Maintain Translation App not working properly (BTP, A...
entry.content:
Hi Sebastian,

please consider following remarks for testing your translation:

  • If you want to test the translated texts of IAM business catalogs directly in the Fiori launchpad of the development system, you have to publish the IAM business catalog once again locally in ADT.

  • If you want to test the translated texts of data definitions or metadata extensions directly in the development system with a Fiori app built on top of these objects, you should first reactivate the objects in ADT to ensure that all caches will be invalidated.

From https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/maintain-translations-select-your-text-sources?version=Cloud

On top of that, I would recommend testing your translations in FLP with a business user by changing the Language and Region settings.

Best regards,
Peter

entry.title: Re: 2024-07 Developer Challenge - Task 0 - Server and service provisioning
entry.content:
Here is my submission

https://flyhigh-simplest-deployment.cfapps.us10-001.hana.ondemand.com/

Regards,

Sushmita

entry.title: Re: Couldn't Find Edit Option for Published Blog Post
entry.content: Same occurs to me! Why is there any help for this. I need to change the blog or if that is not possible, I need to delete it.

entry.title: Re: DMEEX FI_PAYMEDIUM_SAMPLE_41 Exit how to not delete spaces in between nodes?
entry.content: Can you please remove the tag "SAP BTP, ABAP environment"? Since your question relates to a SAPGUI based transaction which cannot be started in an ABAP Enviroment this tag does not apply.

entry.title: Re: Couldn't Find Edit Option for Published Blog Post
entry.content: For issues such as this which can various different reasons please reach out to community@sap.com directly for assistance.

entry.title: Re: SAP RAP Unmanaged scenario example-Simplified
entry.content:
In my opinion you describe the option of "unmanaged" in a too positive way.  

I wouldn't formulate it like this:   

"... allowing developers to leverage their expertise in ABAP programming and database handling while building modern RESTful APIs."   

but more "... forces developers to handle database access themselves which only makes sense when dealing with legacy API's".  

But even then developers should check if it is not possible to use a managed approach with an unmanaged save since this way lots of the implementations you described above are not necessary. 

Managed with unmanaged save is the recommended option. Unmanaged is the last resort.

Kind regards,

Andre

entry.title: Find program to create payment terms in Tcode MIR7
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I can't found program to create payment terms in Tcode MIR7 and MIR4 actually. I was searching in user exit in MIR7 but it was empty. Please help me to found it.

Thank you,
Dio

entry.title: Re: Blast Off! UI5 Web Components 2.0 is Now Live!

entry.title: Re: Capturing the approval form status on SAP BPA (Build...
entry.content:
Hi @Isyraf_Afifi
Here I created a Decision for Approval as well as Reject.

Each of these Decision contains a input property and output property. 

Create a Decision Table like below where output property status is the value you want to capture.

The above decision is the one i created for Approval status (branch). Similar one needs to be created for Reject status(branch).

As Input to the Decision please map a value which would satisfy the condition given in the Decision table.

Hope I am able to explain you.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: No entry in ODQMON and DHCDCMON after doing the Initi...
entry.content: It's correct that no data can be seen in Master log or subscriber log table so long as the delta load can get data.

entry.title: Re: No entry in ODQMON and DHCDCMON after doing the Initi...
entry.content: or may you attach the screen shot of DHCDCMON? But if delta load is fine, no need to concern the DHCDCMON entry.

entry.title: Re: How to recover particular schema from a system backup...
entry.content:
Hi Sachin,

there is no way to extract subset of data directly from database backup. The only option is to recreate DB tenant and access desired data set in recreated tenant.

You can achieve it in two ways:

  1. Using tenant copy/move as per Copying and Moving Tenant Databases.
  2. Using backup/restore method as documented in Copying a database.

In any case, you would create a new tenant in your Dev HANA system - additional to existing DEV tenant, copy/restore PRD tenant, and then access the data you are interested in.

You obviosuly need to have sufficient storage space on DEV system to eprform any of the above operations (not necessarilly same memory as in PRD< but enough storage).

Cheers, Jacek

entry.title: FSM: Default address for activities
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am working in integrated scenarios of FSM with S/4 Hana (also S/4 Hana Cloud).

As far as I observed, there are different behaviours when an activity is created regarding its default address (see also attached screenshot):

  • In case of no assigned equipments, the adress of business partner is set as default. => OK for me
  • In case of assigned equipment to the service call, the equipment address is set as default. => Also OK for me.
  • If an equipment is assigned to the activity, the default address is the address of the business partner. => This is not OK for me: I expect that the equipment address is set as activity address.

In the documentation, I have found the guide for the address resolution but this is not corresponding to my observations.

Does anyone have experience regarding this? Or does anybody know if a customizing is existing where I can influence this setting?

Any ideas are welcome!

Thanks and best regards,

Christoph

entry.title: Re: SAP Alert Notification Service for SAP BTP Custom events
entry.content:
Hello Marius,

Yes, this should be possible - here a blog post about this topic, also linking to an example:
SAP Cloud Platform Alert Notification Custom Alert... - SAP Community

And another example, around SAP HANA: Monitoring HANA Service: Custom Email Alerting - SAP Community

I hope this helps!

Best regards,
Boris

entry.title: Re: SAP RAP Unmanaged scenario example-Simplified
entry.content: Is there a reason to post code as image rather than text? Code as image discourages people from trying by themselves.

Thanks for you informational Blog Post.

The areas and service that SAP is providing is uniquely serves best efficient for business and to use as I tried to explore, with the announcement of chance supports my self in lightening up and taking my service to next level which drives as RISE with SAP. Loves to hear makes me inspires more that boosts my colleagues too.

entry.title: Re: Info type pop ups interrupting back ground jobs
entry.content:
I don't understand. If you don't share your Z code, do you think you can be helped? Obviously, the general answer is "change your Z code to not display the popup in batch" but I guess you're not looking for this obvious answer.

NB: "how to suppress popup in batch" has been asked hundreds of times in the forum.

entry.title: Help finding the Residence time of ILM Object MM_ACCTIT
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I've had some trouble finding the residence time in our system for some objects, some objects dont seem to have a defined residence policiy, and as such I could not find it in the IRMPOL_OVERVIEW, does somebody know a method to find MM_ACCTIT or even better a general resource for finding the various residence time for objects, as they seem to be defined quite differently depending on wether they are e.g: Master Material or FI.

entry.title: Re: CAP: How can I add custom query options in my custom...
entry.content:
Temporal entities rely on specific columns to calculate the 'valid-at' and 'valid-from' entries (see: https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/temporal-data). This would imply you can create your own standard query to select the desired entries like this:

 

SELECT.from(TransportFactors).where({ validFrom: { '>=': '1970-01-01' } })

 

assuming the 'valid-from' temporal column is called validFrom in your entity.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello, Devid!

I am Leonid Lazuta and I can identify myself in following categories:

1. People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts 

2. First generation college students

3. People looking to switch their careers mid-life

Regards,

Leonid Lazuta

entry.title: Re: Unable to open Build Integration Scenario in SAP CPI cloud account
entry.content: tks. I opend it.

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP Multi-tenant App Deployment Failing: CDS not...
entry.content: "cds run" is a sap/cds-dk command which is not available in runtime. You should change this to "cds-serve" (see: https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/releases/archive/2023/jun23#use-cds-serve-as-start-script)

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA DB dead-locks / SAP HANA DB slowness for update queries
entry.content:
Hello,

As already mentioned, SAP HANA database performance can go across multiple topics and any performance issue needs to be investigated in detail before going to drastic steps such as change in architecture and migration to other database.

It seems there is a generic performance issue on your HANA database as every single database operation is impacted. While this is not good for user experience, it may make the investigation easier as its easily reproducible and does not need long running operations unlike other complex performance issues. I would recommend activating performance traces on the HANA database as per below links and then investigate the issue in detail.

Performance Trace | SAP Help Portal

SAP HANA Performance Guide for Developers | SAP Help Portal

2520774 - FAQ: SAP HANA Performance Trace - SAP for Me

Hope this helps.

Thanks, Kishan

entry.title: Re: Integration suite trial account -tile disabled
entry.content: After adding the capabilities, did you assign the newly available roles to your user as well and did a log-out log-in to pick them up for your session?

entry.title: Re: Semi-automatic custom code adaptation for SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hello Juergen,

You are right, the quick fix for SY-UZEIT and SY-DATUM can be incorrect. The third quick fix SY-ZONLO does not make much sense alone. We are about to delete all three quick fixes for SY-fields in the next release / support package.

Thank you!

Best regards,

Mikhail

entry.title: Re: SDK Version 1400 does not support Crystal Enterprise...
entry.content:
Hi Ramesh,

You would need to use the Upgrade Management Tool (UMT) for this migration. Promotion Wizard will not work for Crystal Reports.

Please refer to 1904814 - Best practices for Upgrade / migration to BI 4.x (UMT) - SAP for Me

Regards, Kishan

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytic Cloud Usage Tracking Content will be replaced with new System Overview (Admin Conte
entry.content:
Hello everyone
The new overview is very well done and also performs well. However, I miss the possibility to view the last logins of the users. Is this option available?

Greetings

entry.title: How can I add several Simple Gantt Charts into a Simple Gantt Chart container in SAPUI5?
entry.content:
Hello,
 
I am trying to add multiple sap.gantt.simple.GanttChartWithTable dynamically into a Gantt Chart Container. I have defined the empty Gantt chart container in my XML view and I want to create multiple sap.gantt.simple.GanttChartWithTable in my JavaScript controller and add them to the Gantt chart container. 
 
 
I have the following code: 
        <gnt2:GanttChartContainer id="ganttContainer">
            <gnt2:toolbar>
<gnt2:ContainerToolbar id="toolbar1" design="Auto" showBirdEyeButton="true" showLegendButton="true" ganttSidePanel="onGanttSidePanel" 
                showSearchButton="false" showDisplayTypeButton="true"
 
                </gnt2:ContainerToolbar>
            </gnt2:toolbar>
                >
        </gnt2:GanttChartContainer>
 
JavaScript Controller:
 
 onInit: function () {
                var oGanttContainer = this.getView().byId("ganttContainer");
                var oGanttChart = new sap.gantt.simple.GanttChartWithTable(
                );
                oGanttContainer.addGanttChart(oGanttChart);
},
 
I get the following error: TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'getRowMode')
Uncaught (in promise) TypeError: e is null
    _updateRowHeightInExpandModel GanttChartWithTable-dbg.js:3632
 
If I try as follows, I get the same error:
var abc = new GanttChartWithTable({
enableChartOverflowToolbar: true
});
oGanttContainer.addGanttChart(oGanttChart);

Thanks for the help

entry.title: How to assign a customer as partner for an intercompany STO
entry.content:
As mentioned in the subject we have a scenario where we need to input a customer (final notify party/ sold-to party) into out intercompany STO to be used for its address data in further processing.

When I Try to assign a custom generated partner role (with partner type KU) it gives the following error

"Cannot use this partner role

Message no. CZ327

Diagnosis

The partner role types you can use in partner maintenance for the Vendor Master, Purchasing, and Arrangements areas are limited to 'LI' (Vendor) and 'PE' (HR Master Record), plus, in Retail Industry systems only, 'AP' (Contact Person)."

Kindly help if anyone knows a way to use customer as a partner in purchase order, and what step do I need to follow to configure the same.

Kindly let me know if there are any further queries that would help you in reaching the answer.

Regards,

Mehak

entry.title: AlertSvc, B1i and Workflow user IDs
entry.content:
Hi,

Using SAP 9.3 HANA, can SAP user IDs for AlertSvc, B1i and Workflow be inactive? Will it affect the alert, B1if integration and workflow setup? 

If not, can it set as restricted users instead of full access.

entry.title: Re: How to define the flexible workflow for parked suppli...
entry.content:
Hi Laci,

The functionality you required is not available in S/4HANA Cloud. Currently the supplier invoice workflow only supports two scenarios - Blocked invoice and Parked as complete invoice. You can refer to this online documentation for detailed information:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/eaea55938df044a8a0beeb97ed6ac8cd.html?locale=en-US

There is no workflow for parked supplier invoice.

entry.title: Re: Back to basics with SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) - part 18
entry.content:
I would like to create an SAP BTP CAPM project that includes the following features:
(1). Client-Side Framework: I want to use either Angular or React for the client-side development.
(2). Database: The project should utilize PostgreSQL as the database.
(3). Media Management: The project needs to support file upload and download functionalities. Specifically, the file status should follow this workflow: -
   (a)Initially, the status will be "pending" when the file is uploaded.

   (b) After approval, the status will change to "uploaded".

   (c) The file can later be deleted, but this action requires approval as well.

Could you guide me on how to achieve this setup? Or you will cover this in a future tutorial
